styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents, cutaway diagram, exploded view, evidence bench spread, multiple hardware clusters, hand, glove, pen, tool hero, soot streak, fire, smoke, burn scar

cases.prompt_body: Tight documentary close-up of the Challenger solid rocket booster field joint and O-ring seat, canonical cylindrical steel geometry remains intact and legible, one localized dark seam and faint residue line sit at the ring interface, pre-failure hardware calm, no cutaway diagram, no exploded view, no tools, no hands, parchment beige, muted blue, restrained industrial stillness

Vertical seal-path hardware portrait of two stacked booster segments meeting at the field-joint band, bolts, flange geometry, and O-ring seat stay canonical and text-clean, one subtle wrong-state seam remains visible without turning into soot or ignition, quiet steel surfaces, pale workshop light, no bench spread, no abstract diagram styling

Oblique close documentary view of the solid rocket booster segment interface, the field-joint ring occupies most of the frame and remains fully recognizable as hardware rather than a schematic, one constrained pre-failure contradiction sits in the O-ring band while the rest of the metal stays calm and precise, no hands, no labels, no fire, no dramatic failure cues
